'''ây-w-m''' ('''yawama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yoink|yoink]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yoink|yoink]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-w-m
|-
! Lemma
| yawama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yawamithi|yawamithi]] || [[word:yawamiji|yawamiji]] || [[word:yawamishi|yawamishi]] || [[word:yawami|yawami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yawamuthuth|yawamuthuth]] || [[word:yawamujuj|yawamujuj]] || [[word:yawamushush|yawamushush]] || [[word:yawam|yawam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yawamuthu|yawamuthu]] || [[word:yawamuju|yawamuju]] || [[word:yawamushu|yawamushu]] || [[word:yawamu|yawamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yawamufuth|yawamufuth]] || [[word:yawamufuj|yawamufuj]] || [[word:yawamufush|yawamufush]] || [[word:yawamuf|yawamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yawamethe|yawamethe]] || [[word:yawameje|yawameje]] || [[word:yawameshe|yawameshe]] || [[word:yawame|yawame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yawamothoth|yawamothoth]] || [[word:yawamojoj|yawamojoj]] || [[word:yawamoshosh|yawamoshosh]] || [[word:yawam|yawam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yawamotho|yawamotho]] || [[word:yawamojo|yawamojo]] || [[word:yawamosho|yawamosho]] || [[word:yawamo|yawamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yawamofoth|yawamofoth]] || [[word:yawamofoj|yawamofoj]] || [[word:yawamofosh|yawamofosh]] || [[word:yawamof|yawamof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yawamĂŠthĂŠ|yawamĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yawamĂŠjĂŠ|yawamĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yawamĂŠshĂŠ|yawamĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yawamĂŠ|yawamĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yawamathath|yawamathath]] || [[word:yawamajaj|yawamajaj]] || [[word:yawamashash|yawamashash]] || [[word:yawam|yawam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yawamatha|yawamatha]] || [[word:yawamaja|yawamaja]] || [[word:yawamasha|yawamasha]] || [[word:yawama|yawama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yawamafath|yawamafath]] || [[word:yawamafaj|yawamafaj]] || [[word:yawamafash|yawamafash]] || [[word:yawamaf|yawamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yawamasha|yawamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyawamasha|goyawamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyawamasha|gokiyawamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yawamnĂŒsha|yawamnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyawamnknĂŒsha|goyawamnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyawamnĂŒsha|gokiyawamnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yawamshĂ«sha|yawamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyawamnkshĂ«sha|goyawamnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyawamshĂ«sha|gokiyawamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yawamrosha|yawamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyawamnkrosha|goyawamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyawamrosha|gokiyawamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yawamusha|yawamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyawamnkmusha|goyawamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyawamusha|gokiyawamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yawamsherasha|yawamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyawamnksherasha|goyawamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyawamsherasha|gokiyawamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yawamngasha|yawamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyawamnkngasha|goyawamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyawamngasha|gokiyawamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yawamyasha|yawamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyawamnkyasha|goyawamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyawamyasha|gokiyawamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yawamyamasha|yawamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyawamnkyamasha|goyawamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyawamyamasha|gokiyawamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yawamnĂŒshĂ«sha|yawamnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyawamnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goyawamnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyawamnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiyawamnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yawamnĂŒrosha|yawamnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyawamnknĂŒrosha|goyawamnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyawamnĂŒrosha|gokiyawamnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yawamnĂŒmusha|yawamnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyawamnknĂŒmusha|goyawamnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyawamnĂŒmusha|gokiyawamnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yawamshĂ«nĂŒsha|yawamshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyawamnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goyawamnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyawamshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiyawamshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yawamshĂ«rosha|yawamshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyawamnkshĂ«rosha|goyawamnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyawamshĂ«rosha|gokiyawamshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yawamshĂ«musha|yawamshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyawamnkshĂ«musha|goyawamnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyawamshĂ«musha|gokiyawamshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yawamronĂŒsha|yawamronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyawamnkronĂŒsha|goyawamnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyawamronĂŒsha|gokiyawamronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yawamroshĂ«sha|yawamroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyawamnkroshĂ«sha|goyawamnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyawamroshĂ«sha|gokiyawamroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yawamromusha|yawamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyawamnkromusha|goyawamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyawamromusha|gokiyawamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yawamunĂŒsha|yawamunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyawamnkmunĂŒsha|goyawamnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyawamunĂŒsha|gokiyawamunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yawamushĂ«sha|yawamushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyawamnkmushĂ«sha|goyawamnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyawamushĂ«sha|gokiyawamushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yawamurosha|yawamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyawamnkmurosha|goyawamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyawamurosha|gokiyawamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yawam|yawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:yĂŠwĂŠm|yĂŠwĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyawam|hoyawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoyĂŠwĂŠm|hoyĂŠwĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyawam|hohoyawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyĂŠwĂŠm|hohoyĂŠwĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒyawam|nĂŒyawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒyĂŠwĂŠm|nĂŒyĂŠwĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyawam|nĂŒnĂŒyawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠwĂŠm|nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠwĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻyawam|nĂŻyawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻyĂŠwĂŠm|nĂŻyĂŠwĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyawam|nĂŻnĂŻyawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠwĂŠm|nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠwĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyawam|luyawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luyĂŠwĂŠm|luyĂŠwĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyawam|luluyawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyĂŠwĂŠm|luluyĂŠwĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyawam|liyawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liyĂŠwĂŠm|liyĂŠwĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyawam|liliyawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyĂŠwĂŠm|liliyĂŠwĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyawam|koyawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koyĂŠwĂŠm|koyĂŠwĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyawam|kokoyawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyĂŠwĂŠm|kokoyĂŠwĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyawam|keyawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keyĂŠwĂŠm|keyĂŠwĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyawam|kekeyawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyĂŠwĂŠm|kekeyĂŠwĂŠm]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
